channel.title: Reviews on Environmental Health
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Reviews on Environmental Health

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Ryan Varghese, Pal Patel, Dileep Kumar, Rohit Sharma DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/reveh-2024-frontmatter4

item.title: A systematic review on the association between exposure to air particulate matter during pregnancy and the development of hypertensive disorders of pregnancy and gestational diabetes mellitus
item.description: Article by Ryan Varghese, Pal Patel, Dileep Kumar, Rohit Sharma DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/reveh-2022-0258

item.title: Screen time and childhood attention deficit hyperactivity disorder: a meta-analysis
item.description: Article by Ryan Varghese, Pal Patel, Dileep Kumar, Rohit Sharma DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/reveh-2022-0262

item.title: The association between polycystic ovary syndrome and environmental pollutants based on animal and human study; a systematic review
item.description: Article by Ryan Varghese, Pal Patel, Dileep Kumar, Rohit Sharma DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/reveh-2022-0187

item.title: Residues of carcinogenic pesticides in food: a systematic review
item.description: Article by Ryan Varghese, Pal Patel, Dileep Kumar, Rohit Sharma DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/reveh-2022-0253

item.title: The concentration of Lithium in water resources: A systematic review, meta-analysis and health risk assessment
item.description: Article by Ryan Varghese, Pal Patel, Dileep Kumar, Rohit Sharma DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/reveh-2023-0025

item.title: Polychlorinated biphenyls and thyroid function: a scoping review
item.description: Article by Ryan Varghese, Pal Patel, Dileep Kumar, Rohit Sharma DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/reveh-2022-0156

item.title: The European Union assessments of radiofrequency radiation health risks – another hard nut to crack (Review)
item.description: Article by Ryan Varghese, Pal Patel, Dileep Kumar, Rohit Sharma DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/reveh-2023-0046

item.title: Research progresses on the effects of heavy metals on the circadian clock system
item.description: Article by Ryan Varghese, Pal Patel, Dileep Kumar, Rohit Sharma DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/reveh-2022-0104

item.title: Diagnosing and managing heat exhaustion: insights from a systematic review of cases in the desert climate of Mecca
item.description: Article by Ryan Varghese, Pal Patel, Dileep Kumar, Rohit Sharma DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/reveh-2023-0059

item.title: Para-occupational exposure to chemical substances: a systematic review
item.description: Article by Ryan Varghese, Pal Patel, Dileep Kumar, Rohit Sharma DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/reveh-2023-0019

item.title: Association of the ACE2-Angiotensin1-7–Mas axis with lung damage caused by cigarette smoke exposure: a systematic review
item.description: Article by Ryan Varghese, Pal Patel, Dileep Kumar, Rohit Sharma DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/reveh-2023-0028

item.title: Impacts and mechanisms of PM2.5 on bone
item.description: Article by Ryan Varghese, Pal Patel, Dileep Kumar, Rohit Sharma DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/reveh-2023-0024

item.title: Impacts and potential mechanisms of fine particulate matter (PM2.5) on male testosterone biosynthesis disruption
item.description: Article by Ryan Varghese, Pal Patel, Dileep Kumar, Rohit Sharma DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/reveh-2023-0064

item.title: Exposure to perfluoroalkyl and polyfluoroalkyl substances and risk of stroke in adults: a meta-analysis
item.description: Article by Ryan Varghese, Pal Patel, Dileep Kumar, Rohit Sharma DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/reveh-2023-0021

item.title: Prevalence and concentration of aflatoxin M1 and ochratoxin A in cheese: a global systematic review and meta-analysis and probabilistic risk assessment
item.description: Article by Ryan Varghese, Pal Patel, Dileep Kumar, Rohit Sharma DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/reveh-2023-0069

item.title: The effect of polycyclic aromatic hydrocarbon biomarkers on cardiovascular diseases
item.description: Article by Ryan Varghese, Pal Patel, Dileep Kumar, Rohit Sharma DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/reveh-2023-0070

item.title: Biological effects of electromagnetic fields on insects: a systematic review and meta-analysis
item.description: Article by Ryan Varghese, Pal Patel, Dileep Kumar, Rohit Sharma DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/reveh-2023-0072

item.title: Monkeypox and drug repurposing: seven potential antivirals to combat the viral disease
item.description: Article by Ryan Varghese, Pal Patel, Dileep Kumar, Rohit Sharma DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/reveh-2023-0001
